features.name: bit array with partial slice assignment
features.description: Code should include a bit array declaration with a partial slice assignment to a non-zero starting position

features.name: multiple partial slice assignments to same array
features.description: Code should include a bit array with multiple non-overlapping partial slice assignments from different statements

features.name: non-contiguous slice assignments with gaps
features.description: Code should include a bit array where partial slice assignments leave some middle bits unassigned (gaps in bit range)
